title: Why India must pass the pending Facial Recognition Technology Bill
description: The concept of modern policing heavily relies on the use of technology to implement the law in the true sense. Modern technological equipment and methods may help in enhancing the efficiency of the police force in the prevention and investigation of crime.A private member bill named the Facial Recognition Technology (Regulation of Police Powers) Bill, 2023 has been pending since 2023. The Bill was designed to lay down the procedure regulating the use of facial recognition technology for the purp
